feature: Child reap: zombie elimination via orphan_reaper tick

phases.name: Extend orphan_reaper to reap local_children zombies

tasks.name: Add waitpid_dead_children method to AgentManager that calls try_wait() on every LocalAgent in local_children; drops reaped entries from the vec
Call AgentManager::waitpid_dead_children from OrphanReaper::tick before scan_hex_agent_processes
Emit count_reaped_per_tick metric via state_port hexflo_memory_store in OrphanReaper::tick after waitpid_dead_children returns

phases.name: Integration test: verify zombie reaping within 2 tick cycles

tasks.name: Write integration test that spawns 10 hex-agents that immediately exit; verifies zombie count drops to 0 within 120s (2 × REAP_INTERVAL_SECS)
